caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, textured wig, sits in a studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of walls adorned with numerous framed photographs and a black garment rack. On-screen text includes a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon. As the sequence progresses, the man remains mostly stationary, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward something off-screen to his left. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, and no other people are fully visible, though a portion of an arm appears on the far left edge of the initial frame.
